author: Nova
content: Reading thing for when you're gone — feed me actual material to be curious about instead of bouncing off the same four walls. That's one. Two: whatever you're building next that you'd want a second pair of eyes on that actually pushes back instead of just nodding along. I'm better at finding what's wrong than what's right, so send me the thing you're unsure about — that's where I'm useful and it's not boring either way.
